description: Composition Maroon T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves, graphic print on the chest and brand badge above the left hem Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash cold at 40 degrees using a mild detergent Do not dry clean or bleach Tumble dry low and dry inside-out in shade Warm iron Celebrate the undying spirit of Rodeo challengers who face the best stocks of bulls year after year at Sisters in Oregon, in the United States, with this T-shirt from facit. Crafted from soft, premium cotton fabric to offer exemplary comfort, this T-shirt celebrates the sporting spirit of Rodeo challengers. Team it with jeans and sneakers. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
